title: Substitute Lukaku earns Red Devils draw against Egypt

news.title: Substitute Lukaku earns Red Devils draw against Egypt

world.title: Substitute Lukaku earns Red Devils draw against Egypt

environment.compositionIntent: All-over Pollock field for a measured draw: stained earth and teal atmosphere, a restrained middleground pressure seam, and foreground poured marks distributed through camera space without a literal subject.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained because the accepted parts already distribute an abstract no-subject field across background, middleground, and foreground depths.

contrast.notes: Soft global light keeps the stained ground visible while cream, black, ochre, teal, and red marks retain edge separation.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the single enclosing background atmosphere with camera-pinned shell behavior preserved.
Kept at origin as the background shell and active stained negative-space field.
workshopAcceptance: Static validation succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no errors.
Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview captured successfully with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a dominant all-over Pollock-derived environment: stained teal/blue/earth ground, pale and black skeins, arcing poured lines, splatter droplets, and distributed chromatic sparks around the viewer.

Render report confirms WebGPU mode/backend and WebGPU-safe evidence for utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell, MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, and material factory IDs sky-background-field, color-field, procedural-marks, soft-particles.

compositionAdaptations: Kept as the primary middleground pressure seam and scaled for public-camera readability; visual band remains a readability parameter, not an ownership change.
Kept as the dominant middleground Draw Against pressure seam, scaled for readability under the canonical public camera.
composition modified non-literal-flow-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Static check passed for drafts/non-literal-flow-pressure.module.mjs with no validation errors.
Playwright desktop preview succeeded with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Screenshot previews/attempt-001/001-non-literal-flow-pressure-draft-desktop.jpg shows a readable middleground pressure structure: broad red-vs-blue/earth opposing wedges, a central balanced draw seam, compressed Pollock-like grid strands, measured arcs, and controlled color drops without recreating a full foreground mark field.
Render report previews/attempt-001/desktop-render-report.json confirms WebGPU renderer/backend and WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial plus color-field/procedural-marks factory evidence.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionAdaptations: Kept in the foreground and nudged right/near to add readable Pollock skeins and splatter without covering the balanced draw seam.
Kept foreground and slightly right/near so loops, scratches, drips, splatters, and dots read without burying the primary pressure seam.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Attempt 2 Playwright preview captured desktop screenshot with a wider readable foreground Pollock mark field: stained olive/teal/blue ground, cream/black/ochre/pale-blue poured skeins, gravity drips, splatter disks, and pigment points distributed across near space.
Render report healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, readiness ready, rendererMode webgpu, rendererBackend webgpu.
WebGPU evidence includes safe MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, plus runtime/source material factory evidence for procedural-marks, color-field, and soft-particles.
